figures.caption: Figure 2: Hardware PCNN confusion matrix on the full MNIST test set (10,000 images). Rows represent true digit classes and columns represent predicted classes. The strong diagonal indicates high per-class accuracy across all 10 digits.
Figure 1: Digital twin pre-training dynamics. (Left) Cross-entropy loss curve over 20 training epochs. (Right) Training and test accuracy curves, converging to 96.92% test accuracy in 20 epochs.
